name: Appleland Sports Center
about: AppleLand Sports Center is a family-friendly golf complex in the Shenandoah Valley, established in 1989. The facility features a 12-hole executive golf course with a mix of par 3s and par 4s, an 18-hole miniature golf course, a three-level driving range, and practice putting green. The venue is also equipped with a professional golf simulator available for hourly rentals, alongside private coaching options for all ages. Open daily from 8am to 8pm, the venue aims to provide a fun and relaxed environment for golfers of all skill levels to practice, play, and connect.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional golf simulator available for practice and play
Comprehensive practice facilities including a three-level driving range
Private lessons and group coaching options for all ages and skill levels
Family-friendly environment with miniature golf for all ages
On-site pro shop with equipment from top brands

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site
No mention of alcohol service on-site

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify if rental clubs are provided, but it's recommended to bring your own equipment for use in the simulator and on the course.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food and drink policies on-site, so it's unclear if outside food or beverages are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify the duration for 18 holes on the simulator, but rentals are available in 30-minute and 1-hour blocks.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, AppleLand Sports Center is family-friendly and features an 18-hole miniature golf course suitable for children.
